name: Stickman Peacekeeper
description: The main goal of the hero is to kill numerous enemies that attack him, for this, he can use bombs and shoot at them from various weapons. In each subsequent level, you can use a lot of weapons that will help you easily move from level to level without losing your standard of living, which you can see at the bottom of the screen.
instructions: The more enemies you defeat the more coins you get for it These coins you can spend on improving your weapons
tags: Action, Adventure, Fight, Fighting, Gun, H5, HTML, HTML5, Kill, Killing, Stickman
